generated_oml:
instance FirstAxisSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot consisting of permanent magnet synchronous motor and two gearboxes (gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox)"
    base:contains SiemensSINUMERIK840DController, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller providing position, speed, or acceleration inputs for the first axis"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts electrical current (I_M) into torque (τ_M) for the first axis"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind the gearbox for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (I_M) for the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorData
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) data from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorData
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData
]

instance MeasuredGearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox position data from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionData
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity derived from motor position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque derived from current sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorData
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor torque values (r̂_M)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorData
]

instance SimulatedGearwheelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearwheel data (r̂_G)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData
]

instance SimulatedOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output data (r̂_out)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionData
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural models (Block and Internal Block Diagrams) for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for motor behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for gearwheel behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for cycloidal gearbox behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelingService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation models of motor, gearwheel, and gearbox behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ModelBasedControlService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for data linkage and traceability"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ModelBasedControlService, FrictionModelVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelVisualizationService, FrictionIdentificationService, ModelBasedControlService
]

instance Dashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualization of friction models and robot status"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionModelVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction models in a dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelComparisonInsight
]

instance ModelBasedControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-based control improvements to enhance robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterUpdateAction
]

instance SysMLModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling using SysML Block and Internal Block Diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:provides SysMLModelingInsight
]

instance FrictionModelVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization supporting human decision-making for maintenance and calibration"
]

instance FrictionModelComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from friction model comparisons inform control parameter updates to enhance motion accuracy"
]

instance ControlParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic updates of control parameters based on friction model insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SysMLModelingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model insights for system analysis and design"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction exists as the system is a digital shadow with a one-way data flow from physical to virtual, as per Kritzinger et al. [32], where digital shadows do not push data back to the physical system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time twinning with sensor data streamed via MQTT, enabling immediate processing and analysis of live measurements for friction model identification."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of SysML models, Simulink simulations, AAS, MQTT data streaming, and dashboard visualization to create a unified digital shadow for friction analysis and motion control improvement."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates in the 'as operated' lifecycle stage, continuously monitoring and modeling friction during robot operation to account for wear, tool changes, and application variations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is validated by comparing simulated data (from white-box and black-box friction models) against measured reference data to quantify deviations, ensuring accurate friction identification for control improvement."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for real-time data transmission from physical sensors to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "SysML and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) standards used for system modeling and data integration."
]
